evidence_summary: Official SEC-filed press release states Pfizer and Metsera entered into a definitive agreement on September 22, 2025 under which Pfizer would acquire Metsera. Pfizer’s 2025 Form 10-K then states Pfizer acquired Metsera on November 13, 2025. FTC HSR records also list Pfizer as acquiring party and Metsera as acquired party.
